major_changes_observed: bridge defaults aligned to STM32 derived max linear/angular
odom no longer integrates cmd_vel when MCU status is stale
status payload parser supports 45-byte extended status
system launch defaults real base + EKF + ydlidar_X2_mapping.yaml
robot.sh now defaults base port to /dev/ttyUSB0
remaining_major_risks: SET_MODE ACK still does not prove actual mode transition
fixed /dev/ttyUSB0 base default bypasses active base-port probe
ydlidar invalid_range_is_inf is read but not applied to unfilled scan bins
